name: Will Osborne
description: Canadian-born American bandleader, trombonist, and crooner
abstract: Will Osborne (November 25, 1905 – October 22, 1981) was a Canadian-born American bandleader, trombonist, and crooner.

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Barbutti
about_quotes.evidence: Will Osborne the old band leader was the entertainment director, he was a great guy. And it was Christmas time... Will Osborne you know was joking... We joked around
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Barbutti interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 8, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Sherman
about_quotes.evidence: Will Osborne had contacted me, that he was going to go up and down the coast with forming new band, and would I come with him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Sherman interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 13, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Red Norvo
about_quotes.evidence: Will Osborne -- it was around Rudy Vallee's time and the day -- he was the booker at the Wagon Wheel and in Tahoe.

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Barnet
about_quotes.evidence: I rehearsed and played a few things with, oh, a band by the name of Houston Ray and Will Osborne

about_quotes.speaker: Santo Pecora
about_quotes.evidence: I worked with Will Osborne. ... I made a picture of Blue's of the Night with Will Osborne.
